section_miscategorizations.text: Acne vulgaris is improved and well controlled on the face, but there is a mild flare on the back.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence synthesizes the overall status of the acne (improved/well controlled vs mild flare), which is an assessment/impression rather than a purely objective finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: Recommend continuing current treatment plan for the face and initiation treatment with PanOxyl 10% foaming wash to the back in the shower daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit management recommendation (treatment continuation and initiation of a new medication), which belongs in the Plan rather than the Assessment.
